hardware.label: mock backend (gateway-mediated loopback, local-dev-container, linux/amd64, 4 vCPU, CPU-only) -- NOT real hardware; profiled here for loop-mechanics purposes only, per FL-T004 scope decision. See docs/notes/fitting-method.md.

model.label: mock engine checkpoint 'mock-8b' (mockengine@6827d8c) -- simulated, not real weights

latency_profile.reason: no training point has offered_rate_rps < fitted capacity (31.012 rps) — the queueing-blowup latency model is not identifiable from this data; see docs/notes/fitting-method.md for the calibration run this needs.
latency_profile.data_requirement: one calibration run for this engine_config_id at an offered rate clearly (>=20%) below the fitted capacity_rps above -- see docs/notes/fitting-method.md

holdout_validation.g8_outcome: MISS documented as a limitation, per FL-T004 stop condition (prediction error is a result, not a failure): the model mis-predicts achieved throughput at 5x offered load by 17.0% (under-predicting), several times the measurement-noise floor -- a genuine limitation of the single-parameter capacity-clamp model, not sampling noise. See reports/holdout-validation.md.

reverse_direction_robustness_check.note: NOT the canonical profile; recorded to show the miss is symmetric in scale regardless of fit direction.
